parsed_output.justification: During discussion several participants claim identities of the major non‑werewolf roles—Seer, Robber, Insomniac, and Tanner—leaving a single cycling through the roles unexplained.  Line 31, where Justin states “I saw one. There is a werewolf,” implies he has information about a remaining werewolf card that must be held by one of the players.  Most logically the only unaccounted extra role left is a Werewolf, and the most outspoken mention of a werewolf comes from Justin, suggesting he is the Werewolf.  Consequently, voting against Justin would break the Werewolf threat.
